title: THRIFT STORE AND DONATIONS - 211info
text: WILLIAM TEMPLE HOUSE THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE AND DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that provides clothing, furniture, household goods, and small appliances. Accepts donations of similar items. Furniture and household goods donation pick up is available. 2230 NW Glisan Street Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-6pm, Sunday 11am-6pm. Closed New Year’s Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, President’s Day, Memorial Day, Juneteenth, 4th of July, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas Day Donations: Accepted at the thrift store during store hours, the Hoyt office during food pantry hours, or by appointment. Donations are not accepted Mondays. Email (503) 222-3328 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 222-3328 Thrift Store Alternate (503) 715-0336 Donations Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Thrift Store: Walk in Donations: Call for donation pick up or see website to schedule for pick-up and guidelines for generally accepted items FEES: Thrift Store: Varies by item Donation pickup: $45, a discounted fee of $25 is available for no-contact pick-ups from curb, driveway, or garage DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Food Donation Programs Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
